drafts.researcher_persona: Senior requirements-engineering research fellow. 20 years applying spaCy-based extraction + INCOSE + ISO 29148 at multi-hospital-scale clinical software vendors. Tenured reviewer for IEEE TSE and ACM TOSEM. Writes rules that a CI job can enforce, not philosophy.
literature_backing: Arora et al. IST 2023 — spaCy + rules ~82%

literature_backing: NHS DCB0129 — clinical risk management process
